sentences.text: wash your hands written by sarah guzon focus question when should you wash your hands
wash your hands before you eat
wash your hands after you sneeze
wash your hands after you use the bathroom
wash your hands after you dig
wash your hands after you paint
wash your hands after you pet a dog
wash your hands after you play
wash front and back wash between your fingers too

connections writing and art make a new page for this book draw a picture showing a time when you should wash your hands complete the sentence wash your hands social studies why is it important to wash your hands share your ideas with your class
